infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GeoLink uses your location to show live positions on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GeoLink uses background location so your friends can see live updates.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GeoLink needs access to your library so you can share map moments.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GeoLink uses the camera so you can capture map moments.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: GeoLink uses your location to show live positions on the map.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GeoLink uses background location so your friends can see live updates.

plugins.photosPermission: GeoLink needs your photos so you can share a map moment.
plugins.cameraPermission: GeoLink needs the camera so you can capture a map moment.
